single_mode_partition_z_R.title: Single-mode partition function / Hilbert series z_R(x) = sum_n d_n x^n (Eq. single_mode_Z)
open_questions: Main-text prose (source line 603) says the right panel uses m=5 for Ex.3/Ex.4, but the published Fig. 2 legend uses Ex.3 (m=2) and Ex.4 (m=3). We reproduce the FIGURE (m=2, m=3); the m=5 prose is an internal text/figure inconsistency, flagged in FIGURE_CLASSIFICATION.md.

thermal_occupation_n_beta.title: Free-paraparticle thermal occupation <n_k>_beta = x z'_R(x)/z_R(x) (Eq. n_k_expectation)

solvable_1d_spin_model_free_paraparticle.title: 1D solvable spin model maps to free paraparticles (Eq. Hamil1Dspin)
